message.entry: reference to the MATLAB object does not exist
number of indices should be equal to the number of dimensions
recursive list cannot be passed to MATLAB
invalid field for MATLAB struct
recursive dictionary cannot be passed to MATLAB
None cannot be passed to MATLAB
memoryview cannot be passed to MATLAB
unsupported Python data type: {0}
only 1xN and Nx1 char arrays can be returned from MATLAB
only 1xN and Nx1 cell arrays can be returned from MATLAB
only 1xN and Nx1 string arrays can be returned from MATLAB
unsupported data type returned from MATLAB
only a scalar struct can be returned from MATLAB
array of MATLAB int64 type cannot be returned on this platform
array of MATLAB uint64 type cannot be returned on this platform
comparison can only be made between objects of type 'matlab.object'
'less than' comparison is not supported by 'matlab.object'
'less than or equal to' comparison is not supported by 'matlab.object'
'greater than' comparison is not supported by 'matlab.object'
'greater than or equal to' comparison is not supported by 'matlab.object'
index exceeds matrix dimensions
attribute cannot be retrieved
method cannot be called
